title: SparkLend Assorted Updates
body:
Adds SparkLend Gnosis assets.
Additionally, this PR contains the changes proposed via:

- [Gnosis] SparkLend - Deprecate Market Phase 1
- [Ethereum] SparkLend - Deprecate tBTC Phase 1
- [Ethereum] SparkLend - Deprecate ezETH Phase 1
- [Ethereum] SparkLend - Deprecate rsETH Phase 1

See https://forum.sky.money/t/january-29-2026-proposed-changes/27620
author: blimpa
